title: Amazon Basics 3-Piece Stainless Steel Space Saving Induction Cookware Set - Casserole with Stackable Lid, Soft Touch Handle - 16/20/24 cm, 14.56 inches
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: Encapsulated base for even heat distribution and ideally cooked dishes
Pans nest inside one another for simple storage
Heat-resistant silicone handles, suitable for dishwasher
Suitable for all heating sources, including induction hobs, Vented lids are oven safe to 350° F/177° C, Pots are oven safe to 400° F/204° C
description: From the manufacturer AmazonBasics 6-Piece Stainless Steel Cookware Induction Set Space-saving Cookware set Create your favourite dishes at home with the Amazon Basics 6-Piece Stainless Steel Set includes Silicone Foldable Lid. Each pot (16/20/24cm) nests inside one another for space-saving. No Non-stick Coating Each casserole features an advanced Premium stainless steel bodies. And please be noted this set didn't come with non-stick coating. Details Includes: 16cm(6.5"), 20cm(8") and 24cm(9.5") casserole pans. Premium stainless steel bodies. Comes with stay-cool silicone handles. Suitable for electric, induction cooktop, fire, gas and ceramic stoves Dishwasher safe Vented lids are oven safe to 350° F/177° C, Pots are oven safe to 400° F/204° C Cooking & Cleaning Tips This set is compatible with gas, electric, induction & glass hobs. It supports easy cleaning with dishwasher. Use vinegar or stainless steel cleaner to remove the water stain at the pan bottom.(Detailed steps can refer to video in the detial page) All You Need Despite having all the pots you'll ever need, this set also features clever space-saving storage. The pots nest inside each other when not in use, so you need less space for this collection. Stay Cool Silicone Handle The Heat-resistant and good-grip silicone handles ensures better cooking experiences, and it's suitable for dishwasher. Quick Clean-up This set also includes tempered glass lids with foldable knobs for easy use. The flat design makes these lids ideal for a dishwasher, saving you time and space on clean-up. Quality Construction Each piece in this set is made of premium-quality stainless steel. That means they're lightweight, strong and resistant to rust and corrosion.
